title: Adidas Style Color Block Fashion Editorial Ad AI
sourceTitle: Adidas Style Color Block Fashion Editorial Ad AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-quality split-screen fashion editorial ad with cohesive color-block panels and Adidas-style sportswear inspiration. Subject: Models wearing matching Adidas-style tracksuits and casual sportswear pose against their panel's color: a male model walking in yellow, a female model sitting on a supplies the swappable subject detail for this template. six adult fashion models: male walking, female sitting on a speaker, male jumping, female at a typewriter, female posing, and female standing wear A high-quality split-screen fashion editorial ad with multiple color-block panels (yellow, green, deep red, blue)., each posed naturally against a matching solid-color panel with clean fashion-ad confidence. Scene: Clean studio lighting, vibrant solid-color backgrounds, professional fashion photography, minimalist aesthetic, sharp focus provides the visible environment while the fixed composition and visual style remain intact. A high-quality split-screen fashion editorial ad with multiple color-block panels (yellow, green, deep red, blue). forms the fixed split-screen studio layout with vibrant yellow, green, deep red, and blue backgrounds. Composition: Fixed multi-panel editorial grid with each model contained in a bold color block, varied standing/sitting/jumping poses, clean spacing, and sharp fashion-campaign hierarchy. Signature Elements: Preserved adidas style color block fashion editorial ad source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Wardrobe Style: matching Adidas-style tracksuits and casual sportswear; Color Panel Sequence: yellow walking panel, green speaker panel, deep red jump panel, blue typewriter panel, red pose panel, and yellow standing panel. Style: Professional fashion photography, minimalist sportswear editorial, Adidas-style tracksuit inspiration, vibrant studio color blocking, sharp focus, and clean commercial polish. Color Palette: Fixed yellow, green, deep red, blue, black/white sportswear accents, and crisp studio lighting contrast. Lighting: Clean controlled studio lighting with even model readability, soft garment highlights, and shadow discipline across every panel. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
